rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 25, 2012, line 1. Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction. Off calendar, 1) Moving party failed to comply w ith court order of apr-06-2012 and no points and authorities before apr-09-2012; 2) TRO dissolved. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ABITSCH & ABITSCH, LLC VS. DARUKA WANIGATUNGA et al

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. LATISHA MEADOWS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 25, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to May-04-2012. Opposing party ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b and provide copies of all papers filed in opposition.= (501/REQ)
